goal: Close the unfinished A1 branch from v2 to a definitive PROMOTE/REJECT decision, then open exactly one next low-friction branch only if A1 fails promotion.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never modify base hours, days, thresholds, or execution logic
Nothing counts as improvement unless it passes strict additive integration, permissive integration, ownership, and cannibalization proof
Only one candidate branch open at a time; no parallel wide search
Medium-friction wave B is forbidden until A1 is closed and one low-friction branch (A2 or A3) is fully closed with no promoted candidate

slices.title: Аудит артефактов v2 и фиксация инвариантов v3
slices.hypothesis: Clean up organizational debt from v2 before starting the new cycle: create a fresh v3 project, lock the single immutable reference, and define the hypothesis map.
slices.objective: Clean up organizational debt from v2 before starting the new cycle: create a fresh v3 project, lock the single immutable reference, and define the hypothesis map.
success_criteria: Clean v3 project exists with no reference confusion
Branch closure discipline is formally recorded
evidence_requirements: Clean v3 project exists with no reference confusion
Branch closure discipline is formally recorded

slices.title: Полный forensic-review ветки A1
slices.hypothesis: Recover and reproduce the exact logic and results of A1_high_iv_long_v1 from v2 artifacts before any new testing.
slices.objective: Recover and reproduce the exact logic and results of A1_high_iv_long_v1 from v2 artifacts before any new testing.
success_criteria: A1 is described strictly and reproducibly with no ambiguity
v2 claimed results vs v3 actual results are documented
evidence_requirements: A1 is described strictly and reproducibly with no ambiguity
v2 claimed results vs v3 actual results are documented

slices.title: Stability и concentration для A1
slices.hypothesis: Determine whether A1 survives as a genuine specialist-layer across time windows and is not propped up by a single lucky segment.
slices.objective: Determine whether A1 survives as a genuine specialist-layer across time windows and is not propped up by a single lucky segment.
success_criteria: Honest verdict on whether A1 remains positive after removing any single strong segment
evidence_requirements: Honest verdict on whether A1 remains positive after removing any single strong segment
